phaseRows.name: Operator entrypoint
phaseRows.nextAction: Start here before opening other first-reviewer files.
phaseRows.blocker: None; this index is an orientation map only.

phaseRows.name: One-page runbook
phaseRows.nextAction: Use the printable runbook as the day-of-review sequence and hard-stop checklist.
phaseRows.blocker: Runbook is not real notes, approval, release, or write permission.

phaseRows.name: Runbook misuse guard
phaseRows.nextAction: Keep misuse negative cases passing before using the runbook.
phaseRows.blocker: Runbook cannot become notes, approval, release, grade promotion, launch readiness, or production readiness.

phaseRows.name: Pre-write sample dossier
phaseRows.nextAction: Use as a read-only handoff packet for the first 12 lesson cards and gate sequence.
phaseRows.blocker: Dossier cannot create notes, approvals, release candidates, or readiness claims.

phaseRows.name: Filled-notes positive control v2
phaseRows.nextAction: Use the temporary-file control to prove completed notes become candidate-only rows.
phaseRows.blocker: Positive control is not real notes, approval, release, grade promotion, or readiness.

phaseRows.name: Post-write approval drill
phaseRows.nextAction: Use the temporary drill to prove approval-review candidates stay blocked from release, launch, grade promotion, and production readiness.
phaseRows.blocker: Drill is not real notes, approval, release, grade promotion, launch readiness, or production readiness.

phaseRows.name: Direct-candidate post-write drill
phaseRows.nextAction: Use the temporary drill to validate sourceFitNotes boundaries for BEA, BLS, CFTC, and SEC candidate rows.
phaseRows.blocker: Drill is not real source confirmation, approval, release, grade promotion, launch readiness, or production readiness.

phaseRows.name: Post-write validation simulator
phaseRows.nextAction: Use the temporary simulator to rehearse completion, evidence intake, separate approval, and release-drift guards.
phaseRows.blocker: Simulator is not real reviewer evidence, approval, release, grade promotion, launch readiness, or production readiness.

phaseRows.name: Sequence consistency gate
phaseRows.nextAction: Use the sequence gate to confirm first-reviewer execution steps, operator phases, command rows, and packet order remain contiguous.
phaseRows.blocker: Sequence gate is not real reviewer evidence, approval, release, grade promotion, launch readiness, or production readiness.

phaseRows.name: Day-of-review packet freeze
phaseRows.nextAction: Use the frozen packet to confirm every first-reviewer step has explicit input, expected output, failure route, and forbidden actions.
phaseRows.blocker: Freeze packet is not real reviewer evidence, approval, release, grade promotion, launch readiness, or production readiness.

phaseRows.name: Orient and scope
phaseRows.nextAction: Use the bundle for the human reviewer execution order.
phaseRows.blocker: Bundle is not approval, release, or write permission.

phaseRows.name: Dry-run packet
phaseRows.nextAction: Review file and command order before real note-taking.
phaseRows.blocker: Dry-run output is not real review evidence.

phaseRows.name: Source fit and direct candidates
phaseRows.nextAction: Confirm, downgrade, or block each direct-candidate source role.
phaseRows.blocker: Generated rows cannot confirm direct evidence.

phaseRows.name: Source-fit decision summary
phaseRows.nextAction: Compare confirm, downgrade, and block criteria before sourceFitNotes are written.
phaseRows.blocker: Summary cannot choose the decision or confirm direct evidence.

phaseRows.name: SourceFitNotes card pack
phaseRows.nextAction: Use blank cards for future direct-candidate sourceFitNotes.
phaseRows.blocker: Cards cannot be treated as filled notes, source confirmation, or approval.

phaseRows.name: SourceFitNotes card misuse guard
phaseRows.nextAction: Prove simulated card pollution is rejected before future sourceFitNotes.
phaseRows.blocker: Negative cases are not real notes, source confirmation, approval, or write permission.

phaseRows.name: SourceFitNotes positive matrix
phaseRows.nextAction: Use sample-only confirm, downgrade, and block note shapes before future sourceFitNotes.
phaseRows.blocker: Samples cannot be copied as real notes or treated as source confirmation.

phaseRows.name: SourceFitNotes human-fill preflight
phaseRows.nextAction: Check reviewer identity, candidate decisions, source identity basis, and no-copy requirements before real note entry.
phaseRows.blocker: Preflight cannot choose decisions, fill notes, or grant write permission.

phaseRows.name: Blank notes and safe examples
phaseRows.nextAction: Use blank fields and examples as reviewer scaffolding only.
phaseRows.blocker: Examples and prompts cannot be copied as real notes.

phaseRows.name: Manual start gate
phaseRows.nextAction: A human reviewer must intentionally decide to begin real note-taking.
phaseRows.blocker: Generated state keeps start blocked.

phaseRows.name: Real overlay preflight
phaseRows.nextAction: Run before any explicit write initializer.
phaseRows.blocker: writeAllowedNow:false until explicit human decision.

phaseRows.name: Write readiness lock
phaseRows.nextAction: Use as the final generated hard stop before any real overlay write command.
phaseRows.blocker: Lock cannot replace explicit human note-taking intent.

phaseRows.name: Write authorization preview
phaseRows.nextAction: Use as the generated preview that separates machine-checked gates from the still-missing human write authorization.
phaseRows.blocker: Preview keeps writeAllowedNow:false and cannot authorize or create the real overlay.

phaseRows.name: Day-zero write handoff
phaseRows.nextAction: Use as the one-page day-zero route for pre-write checks, human authorization blockers, write-command preview, and future post-write validation order.
phaseRows.blocker: Handoff keeps writeAllowedNow:false and cannot authorize or create the real overlay.

phaseRows.name: Dry-run bundle audit
phaseRows.nextAction: Use as the consistency audit tying dry-run, overwrite protection, day-zero handoff, final rehearsal, and write locks together before any future real overlay write.
phaseRows.blocker: Audit keeps writeAllowedNow:false and cannot authorize or create the real overlay.

phaseRows.name: Post-write validation
phaseRows.nextAction: Use only after a human-created real overlay exists.
phaseRows.blocker: executionAllowedNow:false and overlay absent.

phaseRows.name: Evidence intake
phaseRows.nextAction: Summarize real note completeness after post-write checks pass.
phaseRows.blocker: No complete note cards exist.

phaseRows.name: Separate approval
phaseRows.nextAction: Keep completed notes behind a separate human approval review.
phaseRows.blocker: No approval-review candidates exist.

phaseRows.name: Launch readiness
phaseRows.nextAction: Use as a blocker dashboard only.
phaseRows.blocker: internalTrialReady:false, launchReady:false, productionReady:false.

singleEntrypointRules: Start from this operator index before any other first-reviewer document.
Do not create or write the real overlay unless preflight passes and a human reviewer explicitly decides to begin note-taking.
Use the post-write command pack only after docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json exists from a deliberate human-review workflow.
Evidence intake is triage only; separate approval review is still required.
This index cannot approve lessons, release learner-facing content, promote grades, grant internal-trial readiness, or change productionReady.
stopConditions: Stop if docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json appears without an explicit human note-taking decision.
Stop if any artifact sets approvalStatus other than not_approved, learnerFacingRelease:true, productionReady:true, internalTrialReady:true, or launchReady:true.
Stop if generated prompts, examples, or worksheets are copied into real notes as review evidence.
Stop if any yellow, red, or research_only source is proposed as learner-facing evidence.
Stop if any note or lesson text adds buy/sell/hold advice, trading signals, performance claims, broker/order workflow, automation, copied source prose, or real-money guidance.
boundary: This operator index is reviewer-facing operations scaffolding only. It does not create docs/LESSON_BATCH_REVIEW_STATUS.json, fill human notes, confirm source use, approve lessons, publish learner-facing content, change grades, certify commercial readiness, provide trading advice, imply performance, connect brokers, automate trading, guide real-money decisions, grant internal-trial readiness, or make the product production-ready.
